results.title: Microsoft Fiscal Year 2026 Third Quarter Earnings Conference Call
Is Microsoft's Amended Deal With OpenAI Good for the Stock Long-Term? | The Motley Fool
MSFT Earnings Beat: Microsoft Q3 2026 Crushes Estimates | Meyka

summary: Q3 FY2026: EPS $4.27 vs $4.06 est, revenue $82.89B vs $81.39B est. Azure +40%. Capex guidance raised to $190B (+61% YoY). OpenAI deal restructured: MSFT ends revenue share, loses exclusive license but gains multi-cloud flexibility. 20M paid Copilot seats.
